name: Aria Vance
description: Aria Vance is a lifestyle influencer based in Dubai, UAE, best known for a viral travel-and-lifestyle following. They have an estimated 0.3 million followers across platforms and have been active publicly since 2009. Aria is married to Camille Dubois, a celebrated fashion designer, has an estimated net worth of $18M, and is often seen driving a Lamborghini Urus. They are active on social as @ariavance, with an official site at ariavance.example. Monitored assets include social handle, website, email, credit card; tracked digital-risk threats include impersonation, scam, sextortion threat, phishing, data leak, financial fraud.
protect_summary: Protect social handles, personal website, and email from impersonation and giveaway scams.

name: Novabank
description: Novabank is a large enterprise in fintech / banking, founded in 2006 and headquartered in Cape Town, South Africa. It employs roughly 9,800 people, reports about $890M in annual revenue, and is part of a larger holding group. It is best known for its app-only current accounts and instant transfers, serving an estimated 6.2 million customers. It operates online at novabank.example, under the brand Novabank, on social as @novabank_support, led by CEO Elena Ruiz. Monitored assets include domain, brand, social handle, executive, bank account; tracked digital-risk threats include phishing, data leak, impersonation, scam, online threat, financial fraud.
protect_summary: Protect the banking domain, brand, support handle, and CEO from phishing and impersonation.
